findings.evidence: `rg` shows the unnormalized transfer lemma at lines 59-62, while the normalized section only has `normalized_eval_T_real_cos_eq_normalizedChebyshevCosine` at lines 136-138 and angular integral lemmas at lines 143, 159, and 173; the roadmap Part C acceptance explicitly asks that `chebyshevHilbertBasis` correspond to the cosine basis via `integral_measureT_eq_integral_cos`.
findings.fix: Add normalized integral-transfer lemmas, at least the product form analogous to `integral_eval_T_real_mul_eval_T_real_measureT_eq_integral_chebyshevCosine_mul`, and preferably scalar-cast/RCLike-facing forms if this feeds `chebyshevHilbertBasis`.
findings.issue: The API only exposes the pointwise normalized pullback, so a consumer relating normalized Chebyshev inner products on `measureT` to normalized cosine inner products over `[0, π]` must redo `integral_measureT_eq_integral_cos` and normalization rewrites.

summary: The new normalized cosine surface is missing the normalized change-of-variables consumer lemma that matches the existing unnormalized API and the roadmap’s cosine-transfer target.
